creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Use canonical format for FreeBSD.org MAINTAINER addresses
  @freebsd.org -> @FreeBSD.org

% cd /usr/ports && make fetchindex
% cut -d\| -f6 /usr/ports/INDEX-8 | grep '@FreeBSD.org$' | wc -l
   16857
% cut -d\| -f6 /usr/ports/INDEX-8 | grep '@freebsd.org$' | wc -l
     105
